# Riverside Tree Service Buffalo NY

Licensed and insured tree removal, trimming, stump grinding, and 24/7 emergency storm cleanup serving Buffalo, NY and all of Erie & Niagara Counties. ISA-certified arborists. Free estimates.

## Services

- [Tree Removal](https://riverside-tree-service-6f7d3.firebaseapp.com/services/tree-removal): Safe, controlled removal of hazardous, dead, or unwanted trees of any size
- [Tree Trimming & Pruning](https://riverside-tree-service-6f7d3.firebaseapp.com/services/trimming-pruning): Structural pruning to ISA arborist standards
- [Stump Grinding](https://riverside-tree-service-6f7d3.firebaseapp.com/services/stump-grinding): Below-grade grinding with complete debris cleanup
- [Emergency Storm Work](https://riverside-tree-service-6f7d3.firebaseapp.com/services/emergency-storm): 24/7 response across Buffalo & Erie County
- [Planting & Arbor Care](https://riverside-tree-service-6f7d3.firebaseapp.com/services/planting-arbor-care): Species selection and long-term tree health
- [Lot Clearing & Hauling](https://riverside-tree-service-6f7d3.firebaseapp.com/services/lot-clearing): Full site clearing for new builds and cleanups

## Contact

- Phone: (716) 703-5296
- Email: hello@riversidetreebuffalo.com
- Address: 9950 County Rd, Clarence, Buffalo, New York
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7am–6pm, 24/7 emergency storm response

## Service Area

Buffalo, Amherst, Cheektowaga, Tonawanda, Williamsville, Orchard Park, Hamburg, Kenmore, Lackawanna, West Seneca, Depew, Lancaster, Clarence, Grand Island, Lockport, Niagara Falls
